title: Fix virtual interface "combinational region did not converge" error

features.name: interface with logic fields
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration with logic field members

features.name: class with virtual interface member
features.description: Code should include a class that declares a virtual interface member (even if never instantiated or used)

features.name: packed struct with logic fields
features.description: Code should include packed struct declarations containing logic fields

features.name: bidirectional assign between interface and struct fields
features.description: Code should include assign statements that connect interface fields bidirectionally with struct fields

features.name: interface instantiation in module
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiated without arguments in a module
